subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Enable this lowly 'Abdu'l-Bahá to serve the righteous ones, and grant success unto this helpless and humble servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار عبدالبهاء خاکسار را به خدمت ابرار موفق فرما و اين بنده بی سر و پا را
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @unity; oneness of humanity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for peace and unity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
